description: Documents required for filing divorce petition or matrimonial disputes
documents: Address Proof (both parties — Voter ID / Passport / Electricity Bill)
Income Proof (salary slips / ITR — last 3 years)
Any prior court orders or injunctions

description: Documents needed for property disputes, title clearance and related matters
documents: Sale Deed / Gift Deed / Will (original + copies)
Title Documents (chain of title for 30 years)
Survey / Sketch of the property (from surveyor)
Any prior court orders regarding the property
Legal Heir Certificate (in case of inheritance disputes)

description: Documents for Section 138 NI Act cheque bounce cases
documents: Any acknowledgment of debt by accused
Earlier payment receipts (if partial payments made)

description: Documents required for bail applications and criminal proceedings
documents: Aadhaar Card / Identity Proof of accused
Surety documents (property papers / income proof of surety)
Prior criminal record (if any — to be disclosed)

description: Documents for filing consumer forum complaints
Documents for wrongful termination and labour disputes
documents: ID Card / Access Card of the company
Any settlement agreements or Full & Final documents

description: Documents for online fraud and cybercrime complaints
documents: Screenshots of fraudulent communications (WhatsApp, email, SMS)
FIR or acknowledgment from Cybercrime Portal
Device details (IMEI number, IP address if known)
Website URLs / Social media profiles of fraudsters

description: Documents for company, LLP, or startup registration
documents: PAN Card of all Directors / Partners
Aadhaar Card of all Directors / Partners
Address Proof — Electricity Bill / Latest Bank Statement
NOC from property owner (for office address)
Digital Signature Certificate (DSC) — if not available
Details of Share Capital (if Private Limited)

description: Documents for GST registration, notices and appeals
documents: Aadhaar Card of Proprietor / Partners / Directors
Proof of Business Registration (Partnership deed, MOA, etc.)
ITR of last 3 years (for assessment matters)
GST Returns (GSTR-1, GSTR-3B) — if already registered
The GST Notice (SCN — Show Cause Notice) with reference number
Purchase and Sales invoices questioned in notice

description: Documents for trademark, patent and copyright matters
documents: Logo / Brand name in JPG format (for trademark)
Date of first use of trademark / brand (proof)
Power of Attorney in favour of attorney
Evidence of infringement (for IP dispute cases)

description: Documents for RERA complaints against builders
documents: Bank loan sanction letter (if home loan taken)
Photos / videos of current construction status

description: Documents for loan recovery cases before DRT
documents: Repayment schedule and actual payments made
